Accept and decline produce different statuses
testAcceptedStatus_hidesAcceptAndDeclineButtons() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.InviteUnitTest
Simulates the logic inside checkStatusAndShowUI for "accepted" status Verifies accept and decline buttons should NOT be shown
testAcceptedStatus_showsAcceptedMessage() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.InviteUnitTest
Simulates checkStatusAndShowUI for "accepted" status Verifies the accepted message should be shown
testAcceptedStatus_showsCancelButton() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.InviteUnitTest
Simulates checkStatusAndShowUI for "accepted" status Verifies the cancel button should be shown

Accepting private invite should set status to waiting in waiting list

testAcceptSelection_setsStatusToAccepted() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.InviteUnitTest
Simulates acceptSelection — status should update to "accepted"
testAcceptSelection_statusNoLongerSelected() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.InviteUnitTest
After accepting, status should not still be "selected"
testAcceptSelection_statusNotDeclined() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.InviteUnitTest

testActivityLaunch() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.AdminLogsTest
Test activity launches.
testActivityLaunchesAndDisplaysTextView() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.WaitingListTest
Tests that the Activity can launch without crashing and that the waitlistCountText TextView is visible on the screen.

Tests that the Activity launches Buttons and typing input bars are there.
testActivityLaunchesNormally() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EntrantAccountTest
Tests that the Activity can launch without crashing under normal circumstances.
testActivityLoadsFragmentFromIntent() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EntrantAccountTest
Tests that when the "loadFragment" intent is passed with "eventList", the activity correctly processes it.

testCoOrgStatus_hidesDeclineButton() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.CoOrganizerInviteUITest

testCoOrgStatus_hidesInvitedMessage() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.CoOrganizerInviteUITest

testCoOrgStatus_hidesRegisterButton() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.CoOrganizerInviteUITest

testCoOrgStatus_showsCoOrgMessage() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.CoOrganizerInviteUITest

testCoOrgStatus_showsOrganizerViewButton() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.CoOrganizerInviteUITest
When device is in coOrganizers, organizer view button should be visible Covers US 01.09.01 — co-organizer can navigate to organizer view
testCountUpdatesWhenEntrantJoins() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.WaitingListAdapterTest
 
testCountUpdatesWhenEntrantLeaves() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.WaitingListAdapterTest
 
testCreateButton_visibleBeforeUpload() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
Create button should be visible before any upload starts.
testCreateFormSwitchDefaultsToOff() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.GeolocationHelperTest
Criteria #1, #3: The Switch defaults to OFF so geolocation is not required unless the organizer explicitly enables it.
testCreateFormSwitchOffMeansGeoNotRequired() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.GeolocationHelperTest
Criteria #1, #3: When the organizer turns the Switch OFF, isChecked() returns false — EventCreateActivity stores geolocationRequired = false, so no location data will be collected from entrants.
testCreateFormSwitchOnMeansGeoRequired() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.GeolocationHelperTest
Criteria #1, #4: When the organizer turns the Switch ON, isChecked() returns true — this is the value EventCreateActivity reads and stores as geolocationRequired in the new event document.
testCsvHasHeaderRow() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.CsvExportHelperTest
Test that the CSV starts with the correct header row.
testDashboardElementsPresence() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.OrganizerDashboardActivityTest
Verifies that the dashboard launches and shows its core UI components.

testDeclinedStatus_showsDeclinedMessage() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.InviteUnitTest

testGeolocationSwitch_toggleOffAgain() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
Tapping the geolocation switch twice should return it to off.
testGeolocationSwitch_toggleOn() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
Tapping the geolocation switch should turn it on.
testGetDeviceIdReturnsValidString() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ProfilesTest
Tests that the getDeviceId method successfully works and returns a value (not empty or null)
testGetEventById_nonExistentId_documentedBug() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventDatabaseTest
Documents the known bug: getEventById throws IndexOutOfBoundsException when no matching event exists because getDocuments().get(0) is called on an empty list without a null/empty check.
testGetEventById_returnsCorrectEvent() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventDatabaseTest
getEventById should retrieve the correct event and map all fields properly.
testGetEventsByOrganizer_doesNotReturnOtherOrganizersEvents() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventDatabaseTest
getEventsByOrganizer should not return events belonging to a different organizer.
testGetEventsByOrganizer_noEvents_returnsEmptyList() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventDatabaseTest
getEventsByOrganizer should return an empty list for a deviceId with no events.
testGetEventsByOrganizer_returnsMatchingEvents() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventDatabaseTest
getEventsByOrganizer should return all events matching the given deviceId.

Tests that the getters and setters accurately update the user's basic information.
testHandlesNonExistentEvent() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.WaitingListActivityTest

testInvitedStatus_showsDeclineInviteButton() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.PrivateEventInviteUITest

testValidation_emptyLocation_showsError() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest

testValidQRScan_closeButtonDismissesPopup() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
After a simulated valid QR scan, close button should dismiss the popup Verifies the user can exit event details and return to event list
testValidQRScan_opensEventDetailsPopup() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
Simulates a valid QR scan by directly launching EventDetailsFragment with a known eventId — mirrors what scannerLauncher does after a real scan Verifies the event details popup opens correctly
testValidQRScan_showsEventDate() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
After a simulated valid QR scan, event date should be displayed
testValidQRScan_showsEventDesc() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest

testValidQRScan_showsEventLocation() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
After a simulated valid QR scan, event location should be displayed
testValidQRScan_showsEventRegEnd() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest

testValidQRScan_showsEventRegStart() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
After a simulated valid QR scan, registration start date should be displayed
testValidQRScan_showsEventSpots() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
After a simulated valid QR scan, spots available should be displayed
testValidQRScan_showsEventTitle() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
After a simulated valid QR scan, event title should be displayed
testValidQRScan_showsEventType() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
